query:
UPDATE backlinks SET platform = 
  CASE 
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%google.com/maps%' THEN 'Google Maps Pack'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%facebook.com%' THEN 'Social Media'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%linkedin.com%' THEN 'Social Media'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%bbb.org%' THEN 'Business Directory'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%yelp.com%' THEN 'Review Platform'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%angi.com%' THEN 'Review Platform'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%mapquest.com%' THEN 'Business Directory'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%owenscorning.com%' THEN 'Industry Partner'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%dnb.com%' THEN 'Business Directory'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%buildzoom.com%' THEN 'Contractor Directory'
    ELSE platform
  END
WHERE sourceUrl IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Vqx4SDKYST7k6m.root --database Da8Aqq7vdypxzx6Gdf6sLN --execute UPDATE backlinks SET platform = 
  CASE 
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%google.com/maps%' THEN 'Google Maps Pack'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%facebook.com%' THEN 'Social Media'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%linkedin.com%' THEN 'Social Media'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%bbb.org%' THEN 'Business Directory'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%yelp.com%' THEN 'Review Platform'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%angi.com%' THEN 'Review Platform'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%mapquest.com%' THEN 'Business Directory'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%owenscorning.com%' THEN 'Industry Partner'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%dnb.com%' THEN 'Business Directory'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%buildzoom.com%' THEN 'Contractor Directory'
    ELSE platform
  END
WHERE sourceUrl IS NOT NULL;
